docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARRERO, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT STATISTICAL ZERO GROUP,LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA STAT ZERO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
